title: Purple Portal and Eyes
description: Retextures the end portal frame, eyes, and the portal itself to be purple!
body:
![The text: "Purple End Portal and Frame" on end gateway texture](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9ededd733e1f9124e71d96d12cc4da411917e7c9.png)
This resource pack retextures the portal, its frame, and the eyes of ender to all be purple, to better match the end aesthetic.

![An End Portal](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/64d6aea88a5557a39d41166d611035a918fafcc3.png) ________________________________________________________________________________________________________________ ![The text: "Credits"](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/044936f5f73c7578883f17dfac0bc2c74afd36d3.png)
This pack is inspired by the following packs, but was still done entirely by me, including texturing and changing the core shaders.
https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/better-end-portal-frame https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/purple-end-portal
